'''gabogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smalls|smalls]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smalls|smalls]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gabogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæbegeth|gæbegeth]] || [[word:gæbegej|gæbegej]] || [[word:gæbegesh|gæbegesh]] || [[word:gæbege|gæbege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gabobogoth|gabobogoth]] || [[word:gabobogoj|gabobogoj]] || [[word:gabobogosh|gabobogosh]] || [[word:gabobogo|gabobogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gabogoth|gabogoth]] || [[word:gabogoj|gabogoj]] || [[word:gabogosh|gabogosh]] || [[word:gabogo|gabogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gabofgoth|gabofgoth]] || [[word:gabofgoj|gabofgoj]] || [[word:gabofgosh|gabofgosh]] || [[word:gabofgof|gabofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gabogotho|gabogotho]] || [[word:gabogojo|gabogojo]] || [[word:gabogosho|gabogosho]] || [[word:gabogoko|gabogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gabogoth|gabogoth]] || [[word:gabogoj|gabogoj]] || [[word:gabogosh|gabogosh]] || [[word:gabogo|gabogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gabogothol|gabogothol]] || [[word:gabogojol|gabogojol]] || [[word:gabogoshol|gabogoshol]] || [[word:gabogokol|gabogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gabogothotho|gabogothotho]] || [[word:gabogojojo|gabogojojo]] || [[word:gabogoshosho|gabogoshosho]] || [[word:gabogoko|gabogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gabogothon|gabogothon]] || [[word:gabogojon|gabogojon]] || [[word:gabogoshon|gabogoshon]] || [[word:gabogokon|gabogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gabogothoro|gabogothoro]] || [[word:gabogojoro|gabogojoro]] || [[word:gabogoshoro|gabogoshoro]] || [[word:gabogokoro|gabogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
